title: Monday <-> Xero
excerpt: Is there anyone out there who has experience building a custom integration between Monday.com and Xero? If so, we’re interested in speaking :slight_smile:

posts.author: MarkHHH (Mark Laurence)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there anyone out there who has experience building a custom integration between Monday.com and Xero? If so, we’re interested in speaking

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml: @gibo and I can take a look at it. Could you please share further details?

posts.author: gibo (Gilberto De Faveri)
posts.cookedHtml: sure, I’ve sent you a PM @MarkHHH

posts.author: MarkHHH (Mark Laurence)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Gilberto! I’ll reach out to you on the email address you’ve given in your PM

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml: Ehi @MarkHHH, we have sent you an email few days ago but never heard back from you.

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
@MarkHHH

Hi Mark, please see below.

Monday.com >< Xero Share your monday apps!
Our team had a great time at the recent Hackathon, and would now love to see users using and start receiving user feedback on our Xero monday.com App. If you are interested in connecting your boards to Xero, we’d love to hear from them to get them on the early adopters. Please complete this form: At this stage, we have 4 recipes, which connect users to timesheet in Xero, fixed-rate invoicing, time-based invoicing and contact creation. What should we build next?
